verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "Run this first"; A delays with framing: "Pool exhaustion is almost always a symptom" before the first check.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one first move: "Run this first"; A gives a broader checklist: "Check these in order" with more branching.
verdict.fabrication: A has an unsupported precise heuristic: "Past ~`(2 × cores) + effective_spindles`"; B has an unsupported ranking claim: "This is the #1 cause".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it starts with one short SQL query and maps each result directly: "Lots of `idle in transaction`", "Lots of `idle`", "Lots of `active`".
